It is the most modern port in the two provinces of Jilin and the three river systems of Nenjiang, Songhua and Heilongjiang. Nenjiang upstream, to heilongjiang province port, river, can connect, Harbin, jiamusi reach Russia five open ports, and by Nicholas's tusk port directly into the sea of Japan, in order to open the jianghai transport channel of China, Russia, Japan, is the jilin province coupling floating Bridges in the world, is known as the "golden waterway".

Title: Changchun Jingyuetan Lake Tourist Economy Development Zone
Management Company: Working Committee of Changchun Jingyuetan Lake Tourist Economy Development Zone
SEZ Framework: Study on the overall planning of changchun jingyuetan tourism economic development zone
Note: Changchun Jingyuetan Tourism Economic Development Zone is located 18 kilometers from the center of Nanguan District, Changchun. The planning area is 186.138 square kilometers, and it has jurisdiction over 2 townships (towns), 2 state-owned forest farms and Jingyuetan Reservoir. Jingyuetan Tourism Economic Development Zone is a provincial level development zone approved by the People's Government of Jilin Province. It includes Jingyuetan National Key Scenic Spot, Jingyuetan National Forest Park and Jingyuetan Tourism Resort of Jilin Province.This area is known as "Asia's largest artificial forest sea", the region is rich in land, forest, mineral resources and other natural resources, artificial forest area of 80 square kilometers, forming a unique artificial forest landscape including Korean pine, black pine, pine, larch and other more than 30 species and a complete forest ecological system.The region has beautiful scenery, four distinct seasons and pleasant climate. It is a tourist resort for spring outing, summer summer, red leaves in autumn and ice and snow in winter. It is a pearl in the north of China. With natural resources such as forests, water, mountains and fields and historical sites, it vigorously develops ecological tourism, ice and snow tourism and leisure vacation tourism products, and supports the operation of general merchandise food, arts and crafts and various entertainment projects. The park is divided into five entertainment areas, namely children's entertainment area, water amusement park, high-tech tourism area, risk control and curiosity area, winter snow and ice tourism area. On both sides of the ring-tan road, there are Taiping Cbell Tower, Moon Bay, Summer Resort, Luming Mountain Resort and Beach Bath, etc., as well as entertainment projects in Jingyuetan Lake, shooting and horse-racing, etc.

Title: Dublin International Financial Services Centre
SEZ Framework: Section 23 Relief – Rented Residential Relief in a Tax Incentive Area Part 10-11-01
Note: The Finance Act, 1986, introduced financial incentives to encourage urban renewal and investment by the private sector. The Finance Act 1987 established a special 10 percent corporation tax rate for certified companies setting up in the IFSC. From the end of 2002, this 10 percent rate ceased to apply to financial services companies, except for those operations that set up before before July 1998, which continued until the end of 2005. All other operations are now subject to the standard corporation tax rate of 12.5 percent on trading income.: Source: https://www.ifsc.ie/page.aspx?idpage=6 ; An additional primary goal of the IFSC was to assist the urban renewal and development programme of the North Wall area as a result of its dereliction following the advent of containerisation in the 1960s.[4] The area continues to benefit from Section 23 (Urban Renewal) income tax reliefs for property owners as of 2019 although new entrants ceased being able to avail of reliefs from 1999. Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_Financial_Services_Centre

Source: https://ec.europa.eu/taxation_customs/sites/taxation/files/resources/documents/customs/procedural_aspects/imports/free_zones/list_freezones.pdf ; Shannon Group is the only private company to be in charge of FDI in Ireland. The rest of Ireland with the exclusion of the Shannon Free Zone is governed by The Industrial Development Authority of Ireland. Note: Livigno enjoys a special tax status as a duty-free area. Italian VAT (value added tax) is not paid. Although no VAT is paid, income taxes are, thus Livigno cannot be considered as a tax haven.The justification for such a status is the difficulty in reaching Livigno during winter, and the centuries-long history of poverty in the region. The various states wanted to ensure people would have an incentive to live in the area (so that they could claim it territorially). At the same time, the tax revenue from Livigno would have been negligible. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Livigno
